sentences.target: Die Ursache ist mir noch unklar.

translations.de: Die Ursache ist mir noch unklar.
translations.en: The cause is still unclear to me.
translations.es: La causa todavía no me queda clara.
translations.fr: La cause reste floue pour moi.
translations.it: La causa è ancora poco chiara per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 原因对我来说仍然不清楚。
translations.yue: 原因對我嚟講仲未清楚。
translations.pt: A causa ainda não está clara para mim.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn chưa rõ nguyên nhân.
translations.ar: السبب لا يزال غير واضح بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: De oorzaak is voor mij nog steeds onduidelijk.
translations.hu: Számomra az ok még nem egyértelmű.
translations.hi: मुझे वजह अभी भी समझ नहीं आ रही है.
translations.pl: Przyczyna wciąż jest dla mnie niejasna.
translations.el: Η αιτία παραμένει ασαφής για μένα.
translations.nb: Årsaken er fortsatt uklar for meg.
translations.id: Penyebabnya masih belum jelas bagi saya.
translations.sv: Orsaken är fortfarande oklar för mig.
translations.ro: Cauza este încă neclară pentru mine.
translations.cs: Příčina je pro mě stále nejasná.
translations.da: Årsagen er stadig uklar for mig.
translations.ja: 原因はまだよくわかりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Ursache' (subject).
Common noun; feminine, singular; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite copula (present 3sg); links subject to predicative adjective; licenses dative experiencer 'mir'.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; experiencer/indirect complement with '… ist jdm. (noch) unklar'.
Adverb of degree/temporality; modifies the predicative adjective 'unklar'.
Predicative adjective (subject complement); positive degree.

sentences.target: Ich suche die Ursache im Keller.

translations.de: Ich suche die Ursache im Keller.
translations.en: I'm looking for the cause in the basement.
translations.es: Estoy buscando la causa en el sótano.
translations.fr: Je cherche la cause au sous-sol.
translations.it: Sto cercando la causa in cantina.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a causa no porão.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm nguyên nhân ở tầng hầm.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de oorzaak in de kelder.
translations.hi: मैं तहखाने में वजह ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter årsaken i kjelleren.
translations.id: Saya mencari penyebabnya di ruang bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter orsaken i källaren.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter årsagen i kælderen.
translations.ja: 地下室で原因を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'suche'.
Finite main verb; present 1sg; transitive, selecting direct object 'die Ursache' and a locative PP 'im Keller'.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Ursache'.
Common noun; feminine, singular; accusative; direct object (theme) of 'suche'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); governs dative; head of PP 'im Keller' functioning as locative adjunct.
Common noun; masculine, singular; dative as complement of 'im'; object of preposition in locative PP.

sentences.target: Der Arzt erklärt die Ursache des Hustens.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ aʁt͡st ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːɐ̯t diː ˈʊʁzaχə dɛs ˈhuːstn̩s./

translations.de: Der Arzt erklärt die Ursache des Hustens.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ aʁt͡st ɛɐ̯ˈklɛːɐ̯t diː ˈʊʁzaχə dɛs ˈhuːstn̩s./
translations.en: The doctor explains the cause of the cough.
translations.es: El médico explica la causa de la tos.
translations.fr: Le médecin explique la cause de la toux.
translations.it: Il medico spiega la causa della tosse.
translations.pt: O médico explica a causa da tosse.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ giải thích nguyên nhân gây ho.
translations.nl: De dokter legt de oorzaak van de hoest uit.
translations.hu: Az orvos elmagyarázza a köhögés okát.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर खाँसी का कारण समझा रहा है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός εξηγεί την αιτία του βήχα.
translations.ja: 医者が咳の原因を説明しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular; determiner of 'Arzt' (subject).
Common noun; masculine, singular; nominative; subject (agent) of 'erklärt'.
Finite main verb; present 3sg; takes direct object 'die Ursache'; the NP has a genitive complement.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Ursache' (direct object).
Common noun; feminine, singular; accusative; head of object NP, governing genitive 'des Hustens'.
Definite article; masculine genitive singular; determiner within genitive NP.
Common noun; masculine, singular; genitive; genitive attribute/complement to 'Ursache' ('of the cough').

sentences.target: Die Ursache ist der lockere Stecker.

translations.de: Die Ursache ist der lockere Stecker.
translations.en: The cause is the loose plug.
translations.es: La causa es el enchufe suelto.
translations.fr: La cause est la prise mal branchée.
translations.it: La causa è la spina allentata.
translations.pt: A causa é a ficha solta.
translations.vi: Nguyên nhân là phích cắm lỏng.
translations.nl: De oorzaak is de losse stekker.
translations.el: Η αιτία είναι το χαλαρό βύσμα.
translations.ja: 原因はゆるんだプラグです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Ursache' (subject).
Common noun; feminine, singular; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite copula (present 3sg); links subject with predicate nominal.
Definite article; masculine nominative singular; determiner of predicate noun 'Stecker'.
Attributive adjective; weak inflection (-e) after definite article; masculine nominative singular; modifies 'Stecker'.
Common noun; masculine, singular; nominative; predicate nominative (subject complement) with copula 'ist'.
